signals.headline: TMC's Abhishek Banerjee criticizing the arrest of I-PAC co-founder Vinesh Chandel as a threat to electoral fairness, acc
signals.raw: TMC's Abhishek Banerjee criticizing the arrest of I-PAC co-founder Vinesh Chandel as a threat to electoral fairness, accusing central agencies of bias against opposition.[1]

signals.headline: Election Commission of India (ECI) publicly censuring TMC for poll malpractices on April 8 and rejecting TMC candidate A
signals.raw: Election Commission of India (ECI) publicly censuring TMC for poll malpractices on April 8 and rejecting TMC candidate Abhinav Bhattacharya's nomination from Krishnanagar North due to a government contract conflict; TMC replaced him with Somnath Dutta.[2][3]

signals.headline: TMC alleging large-scale outsider voter enrollment and complaining to the Chief Electoral Officer
signals.raw: TMC alleging large-scale outsider voter enrollment and complaining to the Chief Electoral Officer.[4]

signals.headline: Speculation on Congress potentially competing with TMC for votes in key districts like Malda, Uttar Dinajpur, and Murshi
signals.raw: Speculation on Congress potentially competing with TMC for votes in key districts like Malda, Uttar Dinajpur, and Murshidabad, amid past vote-splitting dynamics.[5]
